preBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
preBattle.text: Stage 1, city-edge corridor. Sensors say the air is filthy with weak hostiles, so let's use them as a warm-up.

preBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
preBattle.text: Your frame is armed with a forward shot and three emergency bombs. If the screen gets ugly, don't be shy about clearing space.

preBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
preBattle.text: One command unit is hiding behind the trash waves. Break the formation, drop the boss, and come back in one piece.

postBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
postBattle.text: Clean finish. The lane is ours, and your timing on that bomb was better than I expected.

postBattle.speaker: Operator Chloe
postBattle.text: We'll tighten the patterns, add proper boss scripting, and make the next stage meaner. For now, log this as a successful prototype pass.
